description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a complex, multi-sectioned roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are primarily white, with one section painted a muted pink, and the structure includes both open and enclosed areas. The front facade displays a covered porch area with a fence, adjacent to a section with two prominent windows and a main entryway. The roof design combines gable and hip elements, creating a visually interesting silhouette. There are several windows of varying sizes, including a set of three on the pink wall and a large window or door on the white section. The house appears to be constructed from masonry or concrete, with tiled or paved flooring visible in the open areas.
description: A single-story house with a reddish-brown shingled roof, white and pink exterior walls, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. Features include a covered porch, multiple windows, and a complex roofline.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the open porch area, tiled flooring, and the main entryway with blue accents.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the side, emphasizing the pink wall section and the gable roof overhang, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear or opposite side, focusing on the long, continuous roof and the plain pink wall with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective of the front and side, showcasing the covered porch, fenced area, three pink-framed windows, and the main entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a fence, main door under roof overhang, and adjacent windows
